nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst was born in 1306, in Edleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Richard De Foulehurst. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst est née en 1306, à Edleston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard De Foulehurst. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst wurde 1306 in Edleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard De Foulehurst mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst è nata il nel 1306 nel Edleston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard De Foulehurst. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Edleston, Cheshire, England, United King: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエドレストン
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurstは1306年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエドレストンで生まれた。彼女はRichard De Foulehurstとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst(은)는 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 에들레스턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard De Foulehurst(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst nasceu em 1306, em Edleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Richard De Foulehurst. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst родилась в 1306 г. в местности эдлестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard De Foulehurst. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst nació en 1306, en Edleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard De Foulehurst. Murió en su pueblo.
